message:
chore: add release preparation build artifacts to .gitignore

Ignore .cargo-home-release-prep/ and target-release-prep/ directories
created during cross-compilation release preparation builds. These are
ephemeral build artifacts that should not be tracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -288,3 +288,7 @@ release-artifacts/
 storage.sqlite3.activity.lock
 test_bug
 test_dotenv
+
+# Release preparation build artifacts
+.cargo-home-release-prep/
+target-release-prep/
